name: incident-escalation
description: Gives agents a stop-and-report protocol for the organization: how to recognize a reportable situation (phishing, exposed secret, possible data disclosure, security or safety concern), what to do before the irreversible step, and exactly whom to escalate to. Use whenever the agent suspects a security, privacy, or safety incident, or a request that conflicts with policy. Customize the placeholders before deploying.
version_note: Template plugin intended to be customized per-organization before rollout.
